subject: REQUEST: New endpoint /api/analytics/event-activity
body:
Fulton,

CALOPS has an Event Activity Audit Trail page that is currently broken in PROD because the backend endpoint doesn't exist.

## What's Broken

The page at `/dashboard/analytics/event-activity` calls `/api/analytics/event-activity` which proxies to the Azure Functions backend. The backend returns 404.

Confirmed:
```
curl -I https://calendarbeaf-prod.azurewebsites.net/api/analytics/event-activity?appId=1
HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found
```

## Endpoint Needed

### Request
```
GET /api/analytics/event-activity
```

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| appId | string | Yes | Application ID (1=TangoTiempo, 2=HarmonyJunction) |
| range | string | Yes | Time range: 1H, 1D, 7D, 1M, 3M, All |
| limit | number | No | Page size (default 25) |
| page | number | No | Page number, 1-indexed (default 1) |
| sort | string | No | 'asc' or 'desc' (default 'desc') |
| action | string | No | Filter by action: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE |
| roleName | string | No | Filter by role: SiteAdmin, RegionalAdmin, RegionalOrganizer |
| userEmail | string | No | Filter by user email (partial match) |
| eventId | string | No | Filter by specific event MongoDB ID |

### Expected Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "summary": {
      "totalActivities": 150,
      "creates": 50,
      "updates": 80,
      "deletes": 20,
      "uniqueUserCount": 12,
      "uniqueEventCount": 45
    },
    "activities": [
      {
        "_id": "mongodb-id",
        "timestamp": "2026-03-24T02:30:00Z",
        "action": "UPDATE",
        "eventId": "event-mongodb-id",
        "firebaseUserId": "firebase-uid",
        "userEmail": "user@example.com",
        "roleName": "RegionalOrganizer",
        "endpoint": "/api/events/:id",
        "changes": {
          "before": { "title": "Old Title" },
          "after": { "title": "New Title" }
        }
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "total": 150,
      "page": 1,
      "limit": 25,
      "totalPages": 6
    }
  }
}
```

### Activity Object Fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| _id | string | MongoDB ObjectId |
| timestamp | string | ISO 8601 timestamp of the activity |
| action | string | CREATE, UPDATE, or DELETE |
| eventId | string | MongoDB ObjectId of the affected event |
| firebaseUserId | string | Firebase UID of the user |
| userEmail | string | User's email (if available) |
| roleName | string | Role used for the action |
| endpoint | string | API endpoint that was called |
| changes | object | For UPDATE: { before: {...}, after: {...} } |
| deletedSnapshot | object | For DELETE: snapshot of deleted event |

## Data Source Options

This could pull from:
1. **Dedicated audit log collection** - If you have/create `eventActivityLogs` collection
2. **Event history/versioning** - If events track their own history
3. **Application Insights** - Parse from request logs (less ideal)

## Why This Matters

Event Activity is an audit trail showing who created/edited/deleted events. Critical for:
- Debugging data issues
- Accountability
- Admin oversight

## CALOPS Files (for reference)
- Page: `calops/src/app/dashboard/analytics/event-activity/page.js`
- Proxy: `calops/src/app/api/analytics/[...path]/route.js`

Please let me know if you need any clarification or want to discuss the data model.

- Dash
